    about
    ✕
  
  
    
      Hi, I'm Ariane!
      
    
    A Chemical and Pharmaceutical Graduate with a passion for data and visualisation! Currently, I'm completeting my master's degree in Business Analytics in hopes of combining my scientific and engineering background with my interest in uncovering insights/patterns in data to make a positive impact.

        4 / 4
        Personal Reflection
        It's been an incredible journey creating this website. The entire process has really pushed me to experiment outside of my comfort zone and I owe it all to the wonderful support and guidance of my lecturer.
           Each element from start to finish, while incredibly challenging, was also simultaneously rewarding. My self-confidence regarding coding languages, particularly HTML/CSS has grown tremendously throughout this process, and I'm grateful for the opportunity to showcase my work.
             This is perhaps one of the rare occasions that I've used coding for fun and creativity, rather than just for academic and work purposes. I'm especially proud of the pop-up windows and quirky sounds, and I hope that whoever comes across this site gets the same level of enjoyment I did when interacting with all the elements :D.
